summary: Iteration 2 validation of Dharmaraj Ayurveda redesign (white+gold luxury, multi-lang, founder section, new phone, white bottle). All 23 backend pytest cases passed (no regressions). Frontend deltas verified end-to-end: white-bottle image is now first; +91 95129 51226 displayed everywhere (header, footer, mobile menu, contact, confirmation, track, blog, policy pages); old phone 97378 33244 is NOT present anywhere on the rendered site; WhatsApp FAB points to wa.me/919512951226; language switcher EN/HI/GU works and persists across reload via localStorage; founder section + hero founder badge + Jignesh Mehta rendered on Home and About; radial benefits with 10 pods + central bottle present; trust strip with light cards present; product page has new story + how-it-works + radial benefits; full purchase flow (Buy Now -> /checkout -> WELCOME10 -> UPI -> place order) succeeded producing DRJ46578504, and /track verified that order with mobile.
action_items: Inner pages (Product, About, Cart, Checkout, Shop, Blog, FAQ, Policies, Contact) are NOT translated yet — only Home strings translate. Document this as known MVP scope or extend translations to inner pages.

Optional: add explicit translated copies for Header nav labels — currently 'Home, Shop, 1 Vajra, About, Journal, Track Order, Contact' remain in English even on HI/GU (only verified on Home; please confirm intended scope).
Header desktop phone uses leading space ' +91 95129 51226' (cosmetic — has icon prefix).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is still a single 596-line file mixing models, seed data, and routes. Consider splitting into models.py, seed.py, routers/*.py to stay below the 700-line guideline as more SKUs/endpoints get added.
POST /api/admin/reseed is public and destructive — protect by env-token even in MVP.
create_review aggregates avg by loading all reviews into memory — use $group aggregation pipeline at scale.
GST 5% and ₹999 free-shipping threshold are hard-coded in create_order — externalize to config.
i18n translations dictionary is large and inline in translations.js — consider per-language JSON files for easier translator handoff and bundle splitting.
RadialBenefits uses fixed POD_POSITIONS array — ensure responsive layout collapses cleanly on tablet widths (~768-900px) where neither desktop radial nor mobile 2-col grid may fit well.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all delta scenarios + full purchase regression

test_credentials: Guest checkout. Used mobile 9999999999, email test@dharmaraj.in, coupon WELCOME10, payment UPI. Test order: DRJ46578504.
seed_data_creation: Backend was reseeded via POST /api/admin/reseed to pick up the new 1-Vajra image array. Now images[0] = qj5h59j2_image.png (white bottle); images[2] = 2chn5yjn_image.png (old black) as 3rd thumbnail. Seeds remain idempotent and ensure_seed runs on startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Correct route paths: /blog (not /journal), /policy/:kind (not /policies/:kind). Checkout field testids are 'checkout-name' (not 'checkout-fullname'), 'checkout-coupon-input', 'checkout-apply-coupon', 'place-order-button'. Track page testids: 'track-order-id', 'track-mobile', 'track-submit'. Lang switcher: 'lang-switcher-trigger' + 'lang-option-{en|hi|gu}'. localStorage key for lang = 'drj_lang_v1'. Mobile phone cta only visible after opening burger menu on viewport <= 768px. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py.
rca of the issue: No bugs detected. All requested deltas verified working. Full e-commerce regression flow (Home -> Product -> Checkout -> Order Confirmation -> Track) intact.
